title: Is Your Food Label Accurate?

scenes.text: Food labels can be off by 20%—are you eating what you think?
The FDA allows a margin of error in food labeling, sometimes up to 20%.
This can lead to confusion about actual calorie and nutrient content.
Always check multiple factors: ingredients, serving size, and brand trust.
scenes.label: CHECK LABELS THOROUGHLY

scenes.text: Follow for the wellness basics that matter.

description: Food labels can mislead—learn how to read them accurately. Understand the importance of verifying labels beyond just calories. Follow for daily health tips!
